## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSession.saveAsNewVersion() method

Saves as a new version of the original confection. Requires that the collection is mutable.

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveAsNewVersion(options: ISaveConfectionVersionOptions): Result<ISaveResult>;
```
